summary: Code review allows PR #266 for CORE-244 at current scope. The change converts invalid or cross-origin Harbor page scenes into terminal refs-only failure records, extends built-process API smoke for configured task submit and run/result/evidence/session/capability queries, and refreshes carriers. This is mock/local contract evidence only and does not close final live App/Core/Harbor/Lode E2E scope.
